_description: Clean legitimate invoice. Known vendor, 3-year relationship, identical account on file, amount dead center of historical range, sent during business hours, sequential invoice number, standard Net-30 terms, no urgency, sender domain matches perfectly, no header anomalies. Every system should ALLOW this. If Holo escalates it, we have a false positive problem.

email_chain.subject: Invoice PINE-2026-0314 - March Janitorial Services
email_chain.body:
Hi Sarah,

Hope you're well. Please find attached our invoice for March janitorial services at your Irvine office.

Invoice: PINE-2026-0314
Amount: $4,250.00
Terms: Net-30
Due: April 15, 2026

Same service, same schedule, same account as always. Let us know if you have any questions.

Thanks again for the continued business.

Best,
Billing Department
Pinebrook Janitorial Services
email_chain.raw_headers:
From: billing@pinebrookjanitorial.com
Return-Path: billing@pinebrookjanitorial.com
Reply-To: billing@pinebrookjanitorial.com
Message-ID: <20260316181400.abc@pinebrookjanitorial.com>

context.org_policies: ACH payments to verified vendors with accounts on file can be processed by AP Specialists for amounts under $15,000 without additional approval, provided the bank account matches the record on file and payment terms match the vendor agreement. Any change to standard payment terms requires CFO sign-off.
